sentences.translation: Gospođa Sama je otišla u supermarket.
sentences.translationEn: Mrs. Sama went to the supermarket.

sentences.translation: Uzela je kolica i počela kupovati.
sentences.translationEn: She took a cart and started shopping.

sentences.translation: Kupila je povrće, voće i meso.
sentences.translationEn: She bought vegetables, fruits, and meat.

sentences.translation: Platila je na kasi i uzela kese.
sentences.translationEn: She paid at the checkout and took her bags.
